case_title: DUNG TIEN HA et al VS. ANDREW DUFF KAUFMAN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-14-2003 CONTINUED TO DEC-19-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT, ANDREW DUFF KAUFMAN, AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF THEODORE O. BERRY RE: OSC OF AUG-18-04, 1:30 P.M., DEPT. 212 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HA, DUNG TIEN TRUONG, DAVID
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-13-2004. AUG-18-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HA, DUNG TIEN TRUONG, DAVID SERVED OCT-02-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLAR RENT A CAR CO.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2004 CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) ANDREW DUFF KAUFMAN. JAN-28-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ANDREW DUFF KAUFMAN ONLY., AS A PARTY DEFENDANT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ADDRESSED TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S COUNSEL SET FOR MAR-10-2004 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. MAR-10-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-14-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-04-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
